actions.name: saveBusiness
actions.notes: repo.saveBusiness(BusinessProfilesCompanion) at setup_screen.dart lines ~81-88. Upsert (create-or-update: getBusiness() null -> insert, else update). This onboarding screen is the first write, so effectively create. Only these 4 fields are set here; currency is composed as '<code> (<symbol>)' e.g. 'NGN (₦)'. The BusinessProfiles table (database.dart lines 81-97) also has ownerName, phone, category(default 'Provisions'), plan(default 'Free'), paystackSubaccount(nullable) — NOT set by this screen. Money fields: none on this entity. Per S-2 id will be client UUIDv7 on the real create payload (drift id is int autoincrement as-built).

actions.name: logIn
actions.notes: session.logIn() at setup_screen.dart line 89, immediately after saveBusiness. SessionStore seam (session.dart) — as-built just flips a shared_preferences bool 'session.loggedIn' with NO DB write; comment says real impl exchanges phone+OTP for a token. This is the AUTH seam; not a backend business-data action. On success navigates context.go('/dashboard'). No credentials passed here — actual OTP exchange happens on the otp screen; setup only records the signed-in state.

special.notes: Logo 'upload' is a pure UI mock: _logoUploaded bool toggled locally (lines 66, 320, 388), no file is ever picked or sent. No real upload contract on this screen.

uiStatesNotes: _finish() (lines 76-99): try -> saveBusiness + logIn -> context.go('/dashboard') (success). catch -> debugPrint + showAppSnackbar 'Something went wrong. Try again.' then return (error). No explicit spinner/loading widget; button PrimaryButton fires _finish directly. 'Never a silent dead button' — every failure surfaces a snackbar.

referenceData.name: _categories
referenceData.note: Reconciliation decides serve-vs-local. NOTE: BusinessProfiles.category drift default is 'Provisions' and business_profile_screen.dart has a DIFFERENT _categories list (Provision store/Pharmacy/Building materials/Fashion & fabric/POS agent) — the two category lists diverge across screens.

referenceData.name: _currencies
referenceData.shape: List<{symbol: string, name: string, code: string}> (_CurrencyOption, defined lines 22-27)
referenceData.note: Persisted onto BusinessProfile.currency as the composed string '<code> (<symbol>)'.

referenceData.name: _tones

values.name: Gentle
values.sample: Hi Mama Grace, hope you're well. Small reminder about the ₦85,000 whenever you can.

values.name: Friendly
values.sample: Hi Mama Grace, just a reminder your ₦85,000 is due Friday. Thank you!

values.name: Firm
values.sample: Hi Mama Grace, your ₦85,000 is now due. Kindly settle today. Thank you.

referenceData.note: Only the tone NAME (Gentle/Friendly/Firm) is persisted (BusinessProfile.reminderTone, default 'Friendly'); the sample strings are display-only demo copy referencing 'Mama Grace'/'₦85,000'. Same _tones concept appears in templates_screen.dart. Template seed for the reminder engine.

prefillLiterals.note: Non-persisted demo defaults in _SetupScreenState (lines 63-68): _name='Excel Provisions', _category='Provision store', _currency=_currencies.first (NGN), _tone='Friendly', _expanded=false, _logoUploaded=false. These are seeded UI defaults, not backend data.
